display.purpose: AI mood description — weight 500, muted color.

components.name: Inline Search + Generate
components.description: Compact inline row: search field + small Gerar button.
components.css: .ds-inline-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; max-width: 24rem; } .ds-input-search { flex: 1; min-width: 0; height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: oklch(0.93 0 0); background: oklch(1 0 0 / 0.06); border: none; border-radius: 9999px; outline: none; } .ds-input-search::placeholder { color: oklch(0.58 0.01 250); } .ds-input-search:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.58 0.19 252 / 0.45); } .ds-btn-primary { height: 34px; padding: 8px 18px; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(1 0 0); background: oklch(0.58 0.19 252); border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.63 0.19 252); }

components.name: Ghost Chip
components.description: Outline-only mood preset. Minimal visual weight.
components.css: .ds-chip { padding: 6px 14px; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 400; color: oklch(0.68 0.01 250); background: transparent; border: 0.5px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 0.06); border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-chip:hover { color: oklch(0.93 0 0); background: oklch(1 0 0 / 0.06); }

components.name: Grouped Track List
components.description: Minimal grouped list for discovered tracks.
components.css: .ds-track-list { background: oklch(0.16 0.005 250 / 0.55); backdrop-filter: blur(24px); border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-track-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; } .ds-album-art { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 4px; background: oklch(1 0 0 / 0.06); } .ds-track-title { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; color: oklch(0.93 0 0); margin: 0; } .ds-track-artist { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: oklch(0.68 0.01 250); margin: 0; } .ds-text-btn { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.58 0.19 252); background: transparent; border: none; cursor: pointer; }

narrative.overview: Minimal mood-to-music discovery. True black canvas, quiet UI chrome, AI-generated color orbs that bloom when results arrive.
keyCharacteristics: OLED black canvas with vivid AI mood orbs
Ghost-outline chips and grouped track lists
One accent color for interactive elements only

rules.name: The Atmosphere Rule
rules.body: Mood colors live in the background layer only.

rules.name: The Flat Chrome Rule
rules.body: No shadows. Elevation is blur and opacity only.

dos: Do let AI mood colors dominate the background after generation.
Do use ghost-outline chips instead of filled pills.
donts: Don't mimic corporate streaming-app dark themes.
Don't apply mood colors to UI chrome.
